content.hint: 用具体动词描述你的职责，避免笼统说‘帮忙’或‘参与’

blanks.answer: designing the experimental framework and analyzing the results
options: designing the experimental framework and analyzing the results

content.situation: 面试官在了解你的研究项目时，询问你在团队中的角色和具体工作内容
content.speakerText: Can you explain your specific role in that research project?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能解释一下你在那个研究项目中的具体角色吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 描述个人在研究中的具体职责

content.hint: 强调你如何主动调整策略，体现科研思维和适应力

blanks.answer: revisit the data and adjust my methodology based on emerging patterns
options: revisit the data and adjust my methodology based on emerging patterns
give up and start a new topic
ignore the results and stick to the original plan
ask someone else to fix it for me

content.situation: 面试官想了解你如何应对研究中的意外困难
content.speakerText: What did you do when your initial hypothesis didn't hold up?
content.speakerTextCn: 当你的初始假设不成立时，你做了什么？
content.knowledgePoint: 展示问题解决与科研调整能力

content.hint: 突出你如何促进不同背景成员之间的沟通与协作

blanks.answer: translating technical concepts between the engineering and biology groups
options: translating technical concepts between the engineering and biology groups
doing all the writing for everyone
staying quiet until my part was needed
suggesting we work separately to avoid confusion

content.situation: 面试官注意到你参与了跨学科合作，想了解你的贡献
content.speakerText: How did you contribute to this interdisciplinary team?
content.speakerTextCn: 你在这种跨学科团队中做出了什么贡献？

content.responseTemplate: I helped bridge the gap by ___

content.hint: 描述学术贡献时，常使用哪个动词表示‘设计并实现’一个新方法？
content.template: I ______ a new model to predict microplastic accumulation, which improved accuracy by 22%.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（学术贡献常用动词）

content.hint: 表示‘联系、寻求帮助’时，固定搭配是 ______ out to someone。
content.template: The equipment kept failing, so I ______ out to three other labs and borrowed their tools.

content.hint: 在学术研究中，处理数据的核心动词是什么？
content.template: My research taught me how to ______ complex data and turn it into meaningful conclusions.
